name: analysis_report
description: Analysis and report generation workflow. Query → validate → generate → record.

nodes.description: Read SCHEMA_{db}.md to confirm table/column names before writing SQL. If missing, run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py generate <db_path>
nodes.instruction: Read {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/SCHEMA_<name>.md OR run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py show {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/<name>.db --compact. MUST complete before writing any SQL. Never infer column/table names from memory. If SCHEMA file missing: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py generate {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/<name>.db first.

nodes.description: Execute analysis queries against SQLite database (must use schema from load_schema step)
nodes.instruction: Write SQL using ONLY column/table names confirmed in load_schema. Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py search '<domain topic>' --top 5 for domain rule context before querying. Large result sets (50+ rows) → delegate to query-runner agent to avoid context window pollution.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use query-runner when the query is expected to return 50+ rows, when multiple analytical queries are needed, or when full SQL output would bloat Leader context

nodes.description: Cross-validate query results against domain rules. Read checklist, apply each check, report results in checklist_responses.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/analysis_report__cross_validate.yaml. Apply each check against query results. Domain rule lookups: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py search '<topic>' → Read relevant SKILL.md if [→ SKILL:name] appears. Submit pass/fail/na with notes for ALL checklist items.

Delegate to office-report-engine for report generation. Output path: {PROJECT_ROOT}/vault/outputs/<name>_YYYYMMDD.<ext>. Brief must include: query results data structure, column definitions, output format requirements, and whether company brand master / internal reporting style is explicitly required. If company brand master or company-standard visual language is required, consult the local report-builder overlay before execution.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use office-report-engine for generic Office generation; consult report-builder only for company brand-master / internal reporting overlay

nodes.description: Record report output path in project_state.md
nodes.instruction: Add to {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/project_state.md '## 主要產出（當前版本）' block: '- YYYY-MM-DD: <report_name> → <relative_path_from_project_root>'. Keep ≤10 entries, remove old versions if exceeded.
